SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk

Class TerritoryOwner

java.lang.Object
edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView
edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwner
All Implemented Interfaces:
Keyed
public class TerritoryOwner extends TerritoryOwnerView
A mutable version of TerritoryOwnerView. Used internally by Game to modify territory ownership and army counts.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView

    armies, ownerId, territory

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TerritoryOwner(Territory territory)
    Creates an unclaimed mutable territory owner with 0 armies.
    TerritoryOwner(Territory territory, int ownerId, int armies)
    Creates a mutable territory owner with the given owner and army count.
    TerritoryOwner(TerritoryOwnerView copy)
    Copy constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    addArmies(int n)
    Adds the given number to the number of armies... e.g. passing n=2 will add 2 armies to the internal counter.
    void
    setArmies(int armies)
    Sets the number of armies present on this territory.
    void
    setOwner(int ownerId)
    Sets the owner of this territory.

    Methods inherited from class edu.bu.pas.risk.TerritoryOwnerView

    equals, getArmies, getOwner, getTerritory, hashCode, id, isUnclaimed, name, toString

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, finalize, getClass, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • TerritoryOwner

      public TerritoryOwner(Territory territory)
      Creates an unclaimed mutable territory owner with 0 armies.
      Parameters:
      territory - The territory this owner represents.

    • TerritoryOwner

      public TerritoryOwner(Territory territory, int ownerId, int armies)
      Creates a mutable territory owner with the given owner and army count.
      Parameters:
      territory - The territory this owner represents.
      ownerId - The owning agent's id.
      armies - The number of armies present.

    • TerritoryOwner

      public TerritoryOwner(TerritoryOwnerView copy)
      Copy constructor.
      Parameters:
      copy - The state to copy values from.

  • Method Details

    • addArmies

      public int addArmies(int n)
      Adds the given number to the number of armies... e.g. passing n=2 will add 2 armies to the internal counter.
      Parameters:
      n - The number of armies to add.
      Returns:
      The new number of armies, after the change.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this would reduce the number of troops to a negative number.

    • setArmies

      public void setArmies(int armies)
      Sets the number of armies present on this territory.
      Parameters:
      armies - The new number of armies to have in this territory.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If armies < 0

    • setOwner

      public void setOwner(int ownerId)
      Sets the owner of this territory. Pass IAgent.NO_AGENT_ID for no agent.
      Parameters:
      ownerId - Who owns the territory now.
